title: SSO login failure after update
author: customer_A
content: Customer reports being unable to log in via SSO after the January release. Error message: 'session token expired immediately'. This started right after the SSO provider migration. Customer is on the Enterprise plan and this is blocking their entire team of 40 users.

title: SSO session drops randomly
author: customer_B
content: Users keep getting logged out of SSO sessions randomly throughout the day, roughly every 20 minutes. Very disruptive for daily workflow. Started after the same January SSO migration mentioned by other customers.

title: Dashboard loading slow
author: customer_C
content: The analytics dashboard takes over 15 seconds to load when there are more than 10,000 rows of data. This has gotten worse over the last month.

title: Feature request: bulk export
author: customer_D
content: We need the ability to bulk export all reports at once instead of one at a time. Currently a huge time sink for our team every week.

title: SSO login still broken
author: customer_E
content: Following up again -- SSO login has been broken for 3 weeks now since the migration. This is our third support ticket on this issue with no resolution. Considering switching providers if not fixed by end of month.

title: Export feature missing CSV option
author: customer_F
content: Bulk export only supports JSON currently, we really need CSV as an option too for our finance team's workflows.

title: PRD: SSO Provider Migration
author: product_team
content: This PRD outlines migrating our SSO provider from LegacyAuth to NewAuth for improved security and lower latency. Rollout planned for January. Risk: session handling logic differs between providers and needs thorough testing of token refresh cycles before rollout.

title: PRD: Bulk Export Feature
author: product_team
content: Proposal to add bulk export functionality allowing users to export multiple reports simultaneously in JSON format initially, with CSV and PDF planned for phase 2. This addresses recurring customer feedback about export workflow friction.

title: Token refresh race condition in SSO handler
author: eng_team
content: Root cause identified for SSO session drops: race condition in the token refresh logic causes premature session invalidation under concurrent requests. Fix in progress, targeting hotfix release.

title: SSO token refresh race condition FIXED
author: eng_team
content: Fixed the token refresh race condition in the SSO handler by adding a mutex lock around the refresh operation. Deployed in hotfix v2.4.1. Should resolve the random session drop issue reported across multiple support tickets since the January migration.

title: Dashboard query optimization needed
author: eng_team
content: Dashboard queries are not using proper indexing for large datasets, causing slow load times reported by customers with 10k+ rows. Backlog item, not yet prioritized.

title: Weekly Product Sync - Feb 3
author: pm_team
content: Discussed rising volume of SSO-related support tickets since January migration. Agreed this is now a P0 issue. Engineering to prioritize root cause investigation. Also discussed bulk export CSV request coming up repeatedly from finance-heavy customers.

title: Weekly Product Sync - Feb 17
author: pm_team
content: SSO hotfix (v2.4.1) deployed last week, early signs show ticket volume for SSO issues dropping. Will monitor for two more weeks before closing out this incident. CSV export for bulk feature remains unprioritized -- proposed for next quarter roadmap given repeated requests.

title: Customer Interview - Enterprise Customer A
author: research_team
content: Customer expressed frustration with SSO reliability being the biggest blocker to renewing at current tier. Said 'if this happens again next quarter we will have to evaluate alternatives.' Also mentioned bulk export as a nice-to-have but secondary concern.
